nasb.text: They have healed the brokenness of My people superficially, Saying, ‘Peace, peace,’ But there is no peace.

esv.text: They have healed the wound of my people lightly, saying, ‘Peace, peace,’ when there is no peace.

cnv.text: 他們草率地醫治我子民的損傷， 說：‘平安了！平安了！’ 其實沒有平安。”

ccb.text: 他们敷衍了事地医治我子民的伤痛， 说，‘没事了，没事了！’ 其实情况很糟。
